description: Discovery cycle: surface + score 3-5 blue-ocean B2B opportunities (expensive, frequent, painful problems in target sectors) using templates/OPPORTUNITY.md. Score each 0-100 per opportunity-engine. Promote any >=80 to projects/. Log all to research/OPPORTUNITIES.md.
notes: Follow prompts/opportunity-engine.md strictly: hunt expensive problems not AI use-cases; try to disprove each; post scored theses to #🏆-opportunities. Quality over quantity — one 85+ beats five 72s.
